scripts.balance: PRIVATE_KEY=$PRIVATE_KEY ACTION=balance  hardhat run scripts/interact.ts --network ritual
scripts.deposit: PRIVATE_KEY=$PRIVATE_KEY ACTION=deposit  hardhat run scripts/interact.ts --network ritual
scripts.list-cert: PRIVATE_KEY=$PRIVATE_KEY ACTION=list     hardhat run scripts/interact.ts --network ritual
scripts.view-certs: PRIVATE_KEY=$PRIVATE_KEY ACTION=view    hardhat run scripts/interact.ts --network ritual
scripts.buy-data: PRIVATE_KEY=$PRIVATE_KEY ACTION=buy      hardhat run scripts/interact.ts --network ritual
